## Why does the Defence & Government Sector need Quantum Security?
More than any other sector, the defence and government bodies need future-proof security through [post-quantum cryptography](https://www.qnulabs.com/post-quantum-cryptography) and quantum encryption, as national security is under question. Cybersecurity for the military is of high value, as the stakes are incredibly high. The degree of confidentiality is even higher in this sector, whether it involves credentials, communication, control, command, or collaboration.
The need for stronger defence is evident in the proactive actions taken by many countries in the form of advanced and future-proof technologies. According to the Stockholm International Peace Research Centre, defence expenditure is increasing globally due to rising international conflicts. 
![Auto–track Progress](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/6870f4ed8688c481f8942bdc_intrusion-detection.svg)
### Vulnerable to Quantum Attacks 
The existing encryption methods are susceptible to cyberattacks, as they cannot withstand quantum intrusions. Cyberbullies are downloading the data, only to decrypt it later when they have access to quantum computers.
![Loss of Sensitive Data](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/686e336c79c970cadc6423ec_folder.svg)
### Classified & Confidential 
Classified information is not a rarity in the defence and government bodies. To maintain confidentiality, it is inevitable to upgrade and migrate from classical systems to quantum solutions.
![Risk of Quantum Attacks](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/686e33f5389e45f0444392c4_crisis.svg)
### Espionage & Data Breaches 
Quantum adoption has moved from a technological advancement to a strategic imperative. Considering digital espionage and data breaches, a nation’s security is equivalent to a nation’s trust.
Every communication and dispatch in the defence, military, and government is mission-critical. It seeks and demands action. If intercepted, the outcome can be catastrophic, directly affecting lives.
[**Defence Case Study**](https://www.qnulabs.com/case-studies/safeguarding-national-security-qnu-implements-300km)[ Request a demo](https://www.qnulabs.com/request-a-demo)
## QNu’s End-to-end Quantum Solutions for Military, Defence & Government Bodies 
As an industry leader in end-to-end quantum cybersecurity, QNu provides both hardware and software quantum solutions for Indian and global enterprises and governments. Countering the quantum threat to military communication, post-quantum cryptography is the way forward.
### QShield Platform
Bringing both quantum and post-quantum security, [QShield](https://www.qnulabs.com/quantum-security-platform), the world’s first unified quantum security platform, resists any advanced attacks and secures all sensitive data without any limit. From connectivity to communication, quantum encryption to file sharing, empower your entity with our cutting-edge quantum technology.
![Qshield Platform](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/686f69a890e455fee3607f5d_qshield.webp)
### QConnect 
Defend your telecom data with a [quantum-safe VPN](https://www.qnulabs.com/quantum-security-platform/qconnect-quantum-safe-vpn-secure-tunnel) and secure tunnel, keeping data integrity intact. QConnect prevents eavesdropping completely, leaving no room for breaches.
![QConnect](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/686f69d5e1ba09663e6dd85a_qconnect.webp)
### Quantum Key Distribution 
[Quantum Key Distribution](https://www.qnulabs.com/quantum-key-distribution) for military and defence generates unbreakable and unbreachable keys, ideal for establishing secure satellite links, command networks, tactical systems and data centres. Known for its faster deployment and compatibility, QKD is essential for military and defence applications.
![Quantum Key Distribution](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/686f69e486bc2c52d354a7c5_qkd.webp)
### QVerse 
Delivering secure and compliant communication infrastructure, QVerse is India’s first [quantum-safe messaging and collaboration platform](https://www.qnulabs.com/quantum-security-platform/qverse-quantum-safe-messaging-collaboration-platform). It offers both web and mobile access, the most advanced controls, remote data wiping features, and containerised security. The data resides 100% on the organisation’s server for stronger protection.
![QVerse](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/686f69827bbbe3b52747bb22_qrng.webp)
### Quantum Random Number Generator 
Our [QRNG](https://www.qnulabs.com/quantum-random-number-generator) utilises the laws of physics to generate true randomness, which forms the foundation of post-quantum cryptography. It generates non-deterministic keys in real time, making it more secure for various use cases.
![QRNG](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/686f6996dba6c47670b17df9_qrng_2.webp)
### Quantum Safe Drone Communication
Presenting India’s first end-to-end quantum-safe drone communication platform, QNu Labs has entered the realm of drone warfare with an NIST-compliant solution. It is lightweight but supports high-speed data protection.
![QRNG](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/686fa7e02be8f7ae845dd407_drone.webp)
**With QNu as your quantum partner, you are never vulnerable or prone to cyberattacks.**

## Use Cases of Quantum Security in the Defence & Government Sector

## Frequently asked questions 
Can all quantum military applications be secured?
Yes. And it must be. From communication networks to collaboration platforms, from file sharing to authentication, everything in the military and defence carries classified and sensitive data. It must be quantum-safe and future-ready.
Can cyberattacks break the existing military security? 
Feasibly, not today. But definitely in the near future. Security systems that use RSA or other classical encryption are vulnerable to quantum computing. The real threat is that the attackers have already begun downloading military information and will decrypt it once they acquire quantum computers. So, our information is already exposed. Only if an entity is quantum-safe can all this data become unbreakable.
When should we start quantum security for the defence sector? 
The United Nations announced 2025 as the Year of Quantum Technology. Quantum attacks, the next step in the quantum threat timeline, are also fast approaching. Many organisations are introducing new chips and releasing quantum updates every single day. A delay from here will incur significant costs. Along with a financial loss, it will also result in a loss of integrity and sovereignty.  

Is global spending for the defence sector increasing? 
Yes. Significantly. Since the end of the Cold War, the year-on-year increase in global spending for the defence sector has increased in 2024 (9.6%), according to SIPRI. It denotes that the need for a stronger defence is well-accepted, and many countries have proactively taken measures amid rising global conflicts.
Is there any increase in India’s defence expenditure? 
India has proactively invested in future-safe defence technologies through the National Quantum Mission and other initiatives. Notably, India has grown from the 9th Largest Defence Spender to the 5th largest in 2024, according to Nuvama Research Report.

Why does the Defence & Government Sector need Quantum Security?

More than any other sector, the defence and government bodies need future-proof security through post-quantum cryptography and quantum encryption, as national security is under question. Cybersecurity for the military is of high value, as the stakes are incredibly high. The degree of confidentiality is even higher in this sector, whether it involves credentials, communication, control, command, or collaboration.

The need for stronger defence is evident in the proactive actions taken by many countries in the form of advanced and future-proof technologies. According to the Stockholm International Peace Research Centre, defence expenditure is increasing globally due to rising international conflicts.  

Vulnerable to Quantum Attacks

The existing encryption methods are susceptible to cyberattacks, as they cannot withstand quantum intrusions. Cyberbullies are downloading the data, only to decrypt it later when they have access to quantum computers.

Classified & Confidential 

Classified information is not a rarity in the defence and government bodies. To maintain confidentiality, it is inevitable to upgrade and migrate from classical systems to quantum solutions.

Espionage & Data Breaches 

Quantum adoption has moved from a technological advancement to a strategic imperative. Considering digital espionage and data breaches, a nation’s security is equivalent to a nation’s trust.

Every communication and dispatch in the defence, military, and government is mission-critical. It seeks and demands action. If intercepted, the outcome can be catastrophic, directly affecting lives.

Defence Case Study

QNu’s End-to-end Quantum Solutions for Military, Defence & Government Bodies

As an industry leader in end-to-end quantum cybersecurity, QNu provides both hardware and software quantum solutions for Indian and global enterprises and governments. Countering the quantum threat to military communication, post-quantum cryptography is the way forward.

QShield Platform

Bringing both quantum and post-quantum security, QShield, the world’s first unified quantum security platform, resists any advanced attacks and secures all sensitive data without any limit. From connectivity to communication, quantum encryption to file sharing, empower your entity with our cutting-edge quantum technology.

QConnect  

Defend your telecom data with a quantum-safe VPN and secure tunnel, keeping data integrity intact. QConnect prevents eavesdropping completely, leaving no room for breaches.

Quantum Key Distribution  

Quantum Key Distribution for military and defence generates unbreakable and unbreachable keys, ideal for establishing secure satellite links, command networks, tactical systems and data centres. Known for its faster deployment and compatibility, QKD is essential for military and defence applications.

QVerse  

Delivering secure and compliant communication infrastructure, QVerse is India’s first quantum-safe messaging and collaboration platform. It offers both web and mobile access, the most advanced controls, remote data wiping features, and containerised security. The data resides 100% on the organisation’s server for stronger protection.

Quantum Random Number Generator  

Our QRNG utilises the laws of physics to generate true randomness, which forms the foundation of post-quantum cryptography. It generates non-deterministic keys in real time, making it more secure for various use cases.

Quantum Safe Drone Communication

Presenting India’s first end-to-end quantum-safe drone communication platform, QNu Labs has entered the realm of drone warfare with an NIST-compliant solution. It is lightweight but supports high-speed data protection.

With QNu as your quantum partner, you are never vulnerable or prone to cyberattacks.

Frequently asked questions

Can all quantum military applications be secured?

Yes. And it must be. From communication networks to collaboration platforms, from file sharing to authentication, everything in the military and defence carries classified and sensitive data. It must be quantum-safe and future-ready.

Can cyberattacks break the existing military security?

Feasibly, not today. But definitely in the near future. Security systems that use RSA or other classical encryption are vulnerable to quantum computing. The real threat is that the attackers have already begun downloading military information and will decrypt it once they acquire quantum computers. So, our information is already exposed. Only if an entity is quantum-safe can all this data become unbreakable.

When should we start quantum security for the defence sector?

The United Nations announced 2025 as the Year of Quantum Technology. Quantum attacks, the next step in the quantum threat timeline, are also fast approaching. Many organisations are introducing new chips and releasing quantum updates every single day. A delay from here will incur significant costs. Along with a financial loss, it will also result in a loss of integrity and sovereignty.

Is global spending for the defence sector increasing?

Yes. Significantly. Since the end of the Cold War, the year-on-year increase in global spending for the defence sector has increased in 2024 (9.6%), according to SIPRI. It denotes that the need for a stronger defence is well-accepted, and many countries have proactively taken measures amid rising global conflicts.

Is there any increase in India’s defence expenditure?

India has proactively invested in future-safe defence technologies through the National Quantum Mission and other initiatives. Notably, India has grown from the 9th Largest Defence Spender to the 5th largest in 2024, according to Nuvama Research Report.
